sections.paragraph:
const. נְוֵה; with suff. נָֽוְךָ, נָוֵהוּ, נְוֵהֶם, m.-(A) adj.-

(1) inhabiting. Fem. const, נְוַת; Psa 68:14, נְוַת בַּיִת “the inhabitress of the house,” i.e. the matron as residing at home, οἰκοῦρος.

(2) decorous, becoming, f. נָוָה Jer 6:2.

(B) subst. a seat, poetically-

(1) a habitation of men, Isa 32:18 Jer 50:44 of God, Exo 15:13 of animals, Isa 35:7.

(2) a pasture where flocks lie down and rest, Hos 9:13 Jerem. 23:3 49:20 50:19 Job 5:24 followed by a genit. נְוֵה צאֹן Isa 65:10 נְוֵה גְמַלִּים Eze 25:5 נְוֵה רֹעִים Jer 33:12. For the plur. const. is used the form נְאֹות which see.
